title: Grilled Slovakian Pork Chops with Yang's Delight
description: A savory and flavorful Slovakian-inspired dish featuring grilled pork chops and a rich yang's delight fondue sauce.
instructions: Season pork chops with Slovakian Delight and Char's Grill Seasoning.
Grill pork chops for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F.
Meanwhile, heat Yang's Delight Fondue and Rich Fondue Sauce in a saucepan over low heat.
Serve grilled pork chops with the fondue sauce for dipping.
Optional: garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or thyme.
